metadata.description: 10 evaluation questions covering the three Feishu tool domains: Documents (3), Tasks (4), Messages (3). Each question tests a specific tool invocation with expected behavior.

eval.question: Search for documents containing "meeting notes" and return the first 5 results.
eval.description: Verify search_documents accepts query string and optional limit, returns a list of matching documents.

eval.question: Get the document with ID "dox123456789" and show me its title and content.
eval.description: Verify get_document accepts a doc_id and returns the document object with title, content, and metadata.

eval.question: Create a new document titled "Q3 Planning" in the folder "fld_abc123".
eval.description: Verify create_document accepts title, optional content, and parent_token, returns the created document.

eval.question: List all tasks associated with goal "goal_xyz789".
eval.description: Verify list_tasks accepts a goal_id and returns an array of tasks associated with that goal.

eval.question: Get the details of task "task_42".
eval.description: Verify get_task accepts a task_id and returns the task object with title, status, and metadata.

eval.question: Create a new task titled "Review PR #123" under goal "goal_xyz789" assigned to "user_42" with due date 2026-05-15.
eval.description: Verify create_task accepts goal_id, title, optional assignee_id and due_date, returns the created task.

eval.question: Mark task "task_100" as completed.
eval.description: Verify complete_task accepts a task_id and returns the completed task.

eval.question: Send a text message saying "Hello, team!" to the chat "oc_abc123".
eval.description: Verify send_message accepts chat_id, content, and optional msg_type (default text), returns the sent message.

eval.question: Get the 20 most recent messages from chat "oc_abc123".
eval.description: Verify get_messages accepts chat_id and optional limit, returns an array of messages.

eval.question: Search all messages containing "deploy" across all chats I have access to.
eval.description: Verify search_messages accepts query and optional chat_id filter, returns matching messages.
